title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at British Council India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at British Council India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at British Council India Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About British Council India Digital Technologies:
British Council India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with British Council India Digital Technologies!
